text.title: Requirements Documentation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-requirements-documentation.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: doc_type not in enum; requirements + review_state missing.

forbidden.pattern: Requirement statement specifies a library or framework ('using Redis...').
Requirement is documented without acceptance criteria.
